name: Polycar Blitz
short_description: Shift into high gear and defend the moon! In this top-down rougelike vehicle shooter, gun down monsters and upgrade your Polycar to fend off against increasingly difficult waves of alien invaders! Do you have what it takes to win?
detailed_description:
DESCRIPTION

Inspired by Vampire Survivors and Binding of Isaac, Polycar Blitz brings vehicle combat madness to a top-down rougelike within outer space! You and your Polycar are the only thing holding back the monster alien invasion, defend your moonbase and burn every drop of gasoline you have! How many waves of enemies will you be able to survive?

FEATURES

Simple and addictive fun! Check out the list of features below:

  • Infinite Rounds - Push your Polycar to its limit

  • Multiple Vehicle Upgrades - Upgrade your vehicle's health, damage, weapon type, and more!

  • Monster Types - Face off against oncoming hoards of various monsters and abilities

  • Challenging Difficulty - Each level brings additional monsters and increased difficulty

  • Steam Achievements - Enjoy full Steam Achievement support

  • Steam Leaderboards - Brag to your friends on-top of the leaderboards!

RELEASE

Stay up-to-date on our Steam page and through the official Yooper Game Studios Discord server!
